name: DynaVap M Plus
summary: Butane-heated, no electronics, extraordinary flavour. The most repairable pocket vaporiser made.
description: The DynaVap M Plus is a different category. A titanium-tipped stainless steel capsule, heated with a butane torch or induction heater (sold separately), produces clean, flavourful vapour with zero battery anxiety. A click from the cap tells you when it is ready, and you can run anything from a microdose to full extraction from the tiny 0.1g chamber. Modular and repairable, it will still work in fifteen years. It suits patients who want absolute flavour and self-titration over convenience — the learning curve and separate heat source are the trade-off.
